text:
The first image feels quiet and a little unsettling with its empty, angular corridors and cool lighting—a liminal space between destinations. I sense anticipation and a hint of isolation, as if I am briefly untethered from purpose.

The second image fills me with curiosity and creative energy. The bold colors and interactive displays suggest innovation and possibility. I feel welcomed by the playful visual language, and my mind is drawn to the promise of discovery and new ideas. This contrast between the two spaces heightens my awareness of how environments shape my mood and sense of self.
